message.content:
@startuml
title Secure Map Reduce 2 – Shuffle Service Token Flow
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam lifelineStrategy solid
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam noteStyle rectangle
skinparam actorStyle rectangle
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam participantFontName Arial
skinparam participantFontSize 12
skinparam participantFontStyle plain
skinparam participantPadding 5
skinparam participantMargin 5
skinparam participantBorderThickness 1
skinparam participantCornerRadius 5
skinparam participantShadowing false
skinparam participantAlignment center
skinparam participantTextAlignment center
skinparam participantVerticalAlignment middle
skinparam participantHorizontalAlignment center
skinparam participantVerticalPadding 5
skinparam participantHorizontalPadding 5
skinparam participantVerticalMargin 5
skinparam participantHorizontalMargin 5
skinparam participantVerticalBorderThickness 1
skinparam participantHorizontalBorderThickness 1
skinparam participantVerticalCornerRadius 5
skinparam participantHorizontalCornerRadius 5
skinparam participantVerticalShadowing false
skinparam participantHorizontalShadowing false
skinparam participantVerticalAlignment middle
skinparam participantHorizontalAlignment center
skinparam participantVerticalPadding 5
skinparam participantHorizontalPadding 5
skinparam participantVerticalMargin 5
skinparam participantHorizontalMargin 5
skinparam participantVerticalBorderThickness 1
skinparam participantHorizontalBorderThickness 1
skinparam participantVerticalCornerRadius 5
skinparam participantHorizontalCornerRadius 5
skinparam participantVerticalShadowing false
skinparam participantHorizontalShadowing false

participant "Client\n(c)" as c
participant "Resource Manager\n(rm)" as rm
participant "Node Manager\n(nm)" as nm
participant "Shuffle Handler\n(ss)" as ss
participant "File System\n(fs)" as fs

== Bootstrap ==
== Job Definition ==
c -> rm: 1 createJob [...] ()\n: job-id
c -> c: 2 createShuffleToken\n( shfl-tkn-mk )\n: shfl-tkn
c -> c: 3 serializeTokens\n( shfl-tkn, ... )\n: c-tokens{shfl-tkn,...}

== Job Submission ==
c -> rm: 4 submitApplication\n[...]\n( job-id, c-tokens{shfl-tkn}, ... )\n: app-rpt{clnt-tkn}

== Job Initiation ==
rm -> nm: 5 startContainer\n[...]\n( c-tokens{shfl-tkn},svc-tokens{shfl-tkn}, ... )
nm -> ss: 6 initApp\n( job-id, shfl-tkn )
nm -> am: 7 exec
participant "Application Master\n(am)" as am
am -> nm: 8 startContainer\n[...]\n( svc-tokens{shfl-tkn}, ... )
nm -> ac: 9 exec
participant "Application Container\n(ac)" as ac #FF0000
ac -> t: 10 exec
participant "Task\n(t)" as t #FFA500

== Map Task Execution ==
t -> fs: 11 writeShuffleData[]():

== Reduce Task Execution ==
ss -> ss: 12 readShuffleData [SDT:shfl-tkn] (...): shfl-data
ss -> fs: 13 readShuffleData
fs --> ss: 14 shfl-data

== Job Completion ==

footer Client (c) | Resource Manager (rm) | Node Manager (nm) | Shuffle Handler (ss) | Application Master (am) | Application Container (ac) | Task (t) | File System (fs)
@enduml
